item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Body painted myself as both Coraline x Other Mother - MCroft07
item.description: Trying out split paints, they're interesting and I think they look really cool. I couldn't make a decision for a while as to which version of Other Mother to paint, but I think it worked out pretty okay :) also this song is a bop Thanks to the people who are super kind and not inappropriate on my posts, it's appreciated. Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror It's from Coraline (a film) No, it is not AI. I painted my teeth with teeth paint. I use professional body paint covers I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-10 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes I did not go to art school, I am self taught If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them I can promise you there is not *someone else* painting them and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
man that looks good
must never watch rasslin'
as is tradition
don't kink shame
German sexual harassment is more efficient
and the problem is?
seems about right
i don't know when dude works
mmm hmm
no
we've all been there
wait what
i have no idea what this means
hurry
these all offer incredible things
hello mr. pretzel
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Gaming Meme Phone Clearing Dump Pt. 4
item.description: Okay, I've typed some variation of this like 10 times now, so I'm just going to copy and paste this along with the links. The time has come for me to clear out some of the many memes I (for some reason) spent hours sorting into folders. Hope you all enjoy it. I'll post the links to the previous dumps as well for anyone who's interested. Star Wars Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/SVzbsKr Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/agPBjZY Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/3WbYPiO Part 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/D3xLtoh Part 5: https://imgur.com/gallery/hOagKbC Lord of the Rings https://imgur.com/gallery/YrdND58 Marvel https://imgur.com/gallery/J243dDD Harry Potter https://imgur.com/gallery/FCOoDNo Disney https://imgur.com/gallery/VFswkF4 Marvel https://imgur.com/gallery/tgBY85X Gaming Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/tgBY85X Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/dQN08Rs Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/uZJkc2E

item.title: And by "everyone" I mean just the rich.
item.description: I promise you this, if there were a school shooting with about 20 fatalities, it'd be front page news for about 1 day, maybe 2. How long have the major news outlets been talking about this one? Over a week now.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: Getting health care sucks here
item.description: That's it. That's the joke. The joke is on us. MV edit - Life sucks right now. Shared humanity matters. To do my part, I'm giving away my stories for free. More details here: https://imgur.com/gallery/giving-away-18-of-short-stories-on-smashwords-yVTp0vc

item.dc:creator: telemonianajax

item.title: Hobby - Cosplay
item.description: I did the meme... like a year too late - It's not my fault, the new studio space is begging for this kind of thing, okay?? Also, am I a day too late to hobby day? Dangit... I just finished up getting my new space in order! Plenty of new room to craft my cosplays, so I wanted to give a fist look at my new setup! Casue that's my hobby, and always will be! Also had to do the meme while recording my big new "Q&A" video for my fans this week - Really looking forward to next year as I put the new space to good use for you all!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Army Secretary fires 4-star General who meddled in promotion of unfit subordinate, first time in nearly 20 years
item.description: Army Secretary Christine Wormuth -- in a dramatic and rare move -- on Tuesday fired one of the service's top generals following an Army inspector general investigation that concluded he improperly intervened in the process for selecting senior commanders. Gen. Charles Hamilton, who had been the head of Army Materiel Command, was removed after what officials described as a flagrant abuse of authority aimed at securing a leadership role for a subordinate officer who was found unfit for command and had an inappropriate relationship with the general, according to the IG report. The move marks the first time in nearly 20 years an Army four-star general has been outright fired and comes after a Military.com investigation in March detailed how he attempted to intervene on behalf of the subordinate officer. The publication's report earlier this year immediately triggered both his suspension from the command leadership position and the inspector general probe. https://www.military.com/daily-news/2024/12/10/army-secretary-fires-4-star-general-who-meddled-promotion-of-unfit-0?ESRC=eb_241211.nl&utm_medium=email&utm_source=eb&utm_campaign=20241211
item.dc:creator: puzzledeagle

item.title: Memes vol 447
item.description:
I sent this to my mom because she loved princess Di and she responded “Damn!”
“Whoever wins… we lose” no I don’t like that
As a Packers fan, this is amazing. It’s so clever
I’ve never had a pair of docs until a few months ago but I had an off brand pair that my dad called my “croc fartens”
Scruffy and Liza Jane tax
Nessie tax. Why is she sitting like this
Froggy tax
